title: ceodes austro-orientalis
intro: Ceodes austro-orientalis, also known as the Yellow Bristleclub or Yellow Bristle Club Moss, is a species of club moss that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. It is a perennial, evergreen plant that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ceodes austro-orientalis include reducing inflammation, treating respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations, making it a valuable herb for promoting overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Ceodes austro-orientalis can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
